nodes.name: Send Typing Indicator
nodes.notes: Authorization header: Bot YOUR_DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN — set in Discord Bot Token Header credential. Typing indicator expires after 10s; acceptable for Phase 2.

nodes.name: Execute Core Agent
nodes.notes: Points to 02-03-core-agent workflow (created in Plan 02-02). Will error until that workflow exists and its ID is set.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: $('Inject Context').item.json }];

nodes.name: Resolve Identity
nodes.notes: Calls 03-01 Identity Resolver sub-workflow. Returns person_id, display_name, is_new.

nodes.name: Merge person_id
nodes.notes: Merges person_id and display_name from identity resolver into the normalized message payload.

parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT channel_name FROM discord_channel_cache WHERE channel_id = $1), '#' || $1) AS channel_name

WITH params AS (SELECT $1::text AS sid)
SELECT role, content, created_at FROM (
  SELECT 
    h.message->>'type' AS role,
    h.message->>'content' AS content,
    h.created_at
  FROM n8n_chat_histories h
  JOIN params ON h.session_id = params.sid
  WHERE h.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  ORDER BY h.created_at DESC
  LIMIT 20
) limited
UNION ALL
SELECT 'sentinel'::text, NULL::text, NULL::timestamptz
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM n8n_chat_histories h
  JOIN params ON h.session_id = params.sid
  WHERE h.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
)
